title: Sanitation
description:
ESS mission is to offer sustainable and environmental friendly wastewater treatment, sanitation and plumbing services.						
				
				
				
								Environmental Sanitation Solution (ESS) Limited was founded in 2019 by a group of environmental experts who had a common goal to avail cleaner and sustainable way of dealing with (sanitation challenges)/wastewater. There is an enormous potential if wastewater is treated and reused being it is a small or large-scale context. ESS believes in the nutrient cycle and the sooner people realises its potential the better/the green the world becomes.						
				
				
				
					
							
											
													
										To provide professional service related to operation, maintenance and services for decentralized public and private sanitation infrastructures.
									
								
											
													
										To perform professional construction business on decentralized public and private sanitation infrastructures.
									
								
											
													
										To perform professional engineering services for sanitation solutions and related training and capacity building measures!  
									
								
											
													
										Design and build activities related to sanitation services in particular of decentralized wastewater, water supply, storm water, solid waste solutions and biogas technologies. 
									
						
				
				
				
				
					
				
				
					
		
							
		
				
						
					
			
									
		
							
		
				
						
					
			
									
		
				
			
								
						
					
			
								
				
								Our team is comprised of highly motivated and experienced personnel capable of successfully handling any kind of assignment and exceed our customers expectations. The team is made up of graduates from renowned Universities, technical colleges and vocational training with enough experience in handling our clients specific needs.						
				
				
				
						Sanitation
